message:
feat(core): gate asupersync dep and swap Instant for wasm32 prep (bd-19ss5)

Prepare fsqlite-core for eventual wasm32 compilation by making
OS-specific dependencies conditional:

- Move asupersync to cfg(not(wasm32)) target dependency
- Swap std::time::Instant::now() → sync_primitives::Instant::now()
  in connection.rs (3 call sites)
- Swap std::time::Instant import in raptorq_integration.rs

Note: fsqlite-core still won't compile for wasm32 — it depends on
pager, wal, mvcc, btree, vdbe which are deeply native. This change
prepares the structural foundation; full wasm32 support for the
core engine is a Phase 2+ effort.

Verification:
- 2138 core lib tests pass (1 pre-existing failure)
- Native workspace compilation clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
